name: stakload
description: A unified experience that aggregates all of your favourite game launchers

scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --dir apps/frontend build && pnpm --dir apps/desktop build
scripts.build:unpack: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir apps/desktop exec electron-builder --projectDir . --config electron-builder.yml --dir
scripts.build:win: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir apps/desktop exec electron-builder --projectDir . --config electron-builder.yml --win
scripts.build:mac: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir apps/desktop exec electron-builder --projectDir . --config electron-builder.yml --mac
scripts.build:linux: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir apps/desktop exec electron-builder --projectDir . --config electron-builder.yml --linux
